calendar.matters:
Motion To Set Aside The Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-30-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT ANTHONY REYES, MARY REYES Motion To Set Aside The Default And Default Judgment -- Granted, no opposition filed. (DAG/301/JU) Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780

To Set Aside Default
Off Calendar May-12-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jeffrey R. Cluett, Esq., 626-5671, for defendant Tom Navasero moving to set aside default judgment
William Webb Farrer, Esq., 765-9100, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified -- DEFENDANT TOM NAVASERO'S Motion To Set Aside Default judgment -- Granted; 10 days leave to answer otherwise respond. The Court further ordered that the abstract of judgment rendered against defendant Navasero to stay for 45 days or until a motion for writ of attachment is heard, whichever comes first. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/CW) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
